parameters.url: ={{ (function() { var params = $('Validate Inputs').first().json; var base = 'https://YOUR_SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF.supabase.co/rest/v1/leads_full?select=place_id,business_name,category,city,state,phone,website,google_rating,review_count,maps_description,email,website_phone,owner_name,linkedin_profiles,company_description,linkedin,facebook,instagram,twitter'; if (params.place_ids && params.place_ids.length > 0) { return base + '&place_id=in.(' + params.place_ids.join(',') + ')'; } return base + '&crawl_status=not.is.null&order=scraped_at.desc&limit=50'; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $json.prompt.system }, { role: 'user', content: $json.prompt.user }], response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 1200 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ place_id: $json.place_id, profile_id: $json.profile_id, channel: $json.channel, tone: $json.tone, subject_line: $json.subject_line, message_body: $json.message_body, linkedin_connection_note: $json.linkedin_connection_note, whatsapp_link: $json.whatsapp_link, personalization_score: $json.personalization_score, personalization_notes: $json.personalization_notes, status: $json.status, model_used: $json.model_used }) }}

nodes.name: Split Email Items
nodes.notes: DORMANT — enable this + Gmail Send when ready to send. Splits the messages summary into one item per email lead.

nodes.name: Gmail Send (Dormant)
nodes.notes: DORMANT — configure Google OAuth2 credential, then enable this + Split Email Items to activate sending.
